title: Founder OS HQ - Content
description: Consolidated content database merging P08 Newsletter Draft Engine newsletter drafts, P24 LinkedIn Post Generator posts, and P01 Inbox Zero email drafts.

Title.description: Post topic, email subject, or newsletter title

Style Notes.description: P24: Style guidance or voice notes

notes: P01 Inbox Zero writes email drafts with Type='Email Draft' and Status lifecycle: To Review -> Approved -> Sent to Gmail. P08 writes newsletters with Type='Newsletter'. P24 writes LinkedIn posts with Type='LinkedIn Post'. Company relation is populated when content is related to a specific client. Idempotent: P24 by Post Topic + Framework + same calendar day; P08 by Topic + same calendar day; P01 by email subject. Discovery: search 'Founder OS HQ - Content' first, then fall back to plugin-specific names.
